items.headline: NBA Roundup: Jokic has 34th triple-double, Nuggets top Grizzlies for 10th straight win
items.blurb: NBA Roundup: Jokic has 34th triple-double, Nuggets top Grizzlies for 10th straight win — Nikola Jokic had 14 points, 15 rebounds and 10 assists for his 34th triple-double of the season, and Denver beat the Memphis Grizzlies 136-119 on Wednesday night for the Nuggets’ 10th straight win.

items.blurb: Cunningham has double-double in return as Pistons trounce Bucks — Cade Cunningham had 13 points and 10 assists in his return from injury as the Detroit Pistons beat the Milwaukee Bucks 137-111 in their home finale on Wednesday night.

items.blurb: NBA investigating Kings for bizarre play vs. Warriors in wake of Draymond Green complaints — The NBA has only disciplined two teams for trying to lose this season. Now they're investigating the Sacramento Kings for a simple reason: The league got embarrassed.

items.headline: Jalen Green: Doesn't return Wednesday
items.blurb: Jalen Green: Doesn't return Wednesday — Green (knee) exited Wednesday's 112-107 win over the Mavericks in the first quarter and did not return, finishing with zero points (0-2 FG, 0-1 3Pt) and one rebound in four minutes. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
